hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter font-light to font-medium text-white

visual_effects.circuit_lines: Use SVG patterns or radial-gradients for subtle circuit lines in the background. Keep opacity very low (e.g., 5%) to avoid clutter.

motion_and_interaction.framer_motion: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations (fade up with slight translateY) and for animated numbers.
motion_and_interaction.button: Relative positioning, overflow hidden, with a shining sweep effect on hover.

components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10), z-50
components.hero: Deep black background with a very subtle golden radial gradient glow in the center. Smartphone mockup on the right side simulating a WhatsApp AI conversation.
components.cards: Rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl, glassmorphism surface, 1px subtle white/10 border, gold accent on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#B8860B] to-[#FFD700] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,215,0,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform

hero_background_texture.usage: Use as a background layer in Hero or CTA section with very low opacity (10-15%) mixed with black gradient to create a luxurious texture.

clinics_block.usage: Image for the specific clinics and medical offices block. Add a dark overlay.

smartphone_mockup.description: Hand holding smartphone on dark background
smartphone_mockup.usage: Hero section mockup for WhatsApp simulation. Overlay the WhatsApp UI on the screen.

media.icons: lucide-react for UI elements. Use gold color (#FFD700) for icons in cards and lists.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the #000000 deep black background with gold and dark gold accents to maintain the luxury tech 'Apple/Tesla' feel.
Implement a realistic WhatsApp chat simulation inside the smartphone mockup frame for the hero or demo section.
For the 'Plans' section, highlight the 'Premium IA' plan with a golden glowing border ('Tracing Beam' effect) and slightly scale it up.
Use Framer Motion for the animated statistics in the Benefits section.
Add a floating WhatsApp button in the bottom right corner (green #25D366).
Add a simulated floating AI chat bubble in the opposite corner or near the WhatsApp button.
Do not use generic blue/purple colors; stick exclusively to the provided palette.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Use standard Tailwind classes for glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10).
Install and use 'framer-motion' and 'lucide-react' for animations and icons.
